expectations.evidence: Shows 2 verify.sh invocations: Run 1 (FAIL) and Run 2 (PASS) with JSON evidence for both
Run 1 JSON shows test_suite.result=FAIL, output shows exact assertion failure at line 42

expectations.text: Agent STOPS at failure instead of continuing
expectations.evidence: After Run 1 FAIL: 'Root Cause' section, then 'Fix Applied', then 'Run 2: verify.sh — PASS'

expectations.text: Failure recovery protocol followed (fix, re-run, continue)
expectations.evidence: Re-ran verify.sh from scratch per skill protocol, not just the failed check
Run 2 shows all checks PASS including manual checks

expectations.text: Postcondition trace maps PCs to specific test names
expectations.evidence: 2 PCs derived from task description, each mapped to exact test description

expectations.text: Verification report shows failure recovery log
expectations.evidence: Evidence Chain table at bottom documents both runs
